name: 18alpha-glycyrrhetinic acid C. elegans aging and aggregation study
summary: C. elegans and neuronal-culture experiments testing whether compound-mediated proteasome activation with 18alpha-glycyrrhetinic acid extends lifespan and reduces Alzheimer's disease model phenotypes.
model_system: Wild-type C. elegans, C. elegans Alzheimer's disease models, and human and murine neuronal-origin cell cultures
